name: new-wealth
description: Dhanam NCD platform — rewrite (React SPA + modular-monolith API)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @new-wealth/shared && npm run build -w @new-wealth/api && npm run build -w @new-wealth/web
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @new-wealth/api & npm run dev -w @new-wealth/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @new-wealth/shared && npm run typecheck -w @new-wealth/api && npm run typecheck -w @new-wealth/web
